name: closure
title: Closure Table Maintenance
description: This operation provides support for ongoing maintenance of a client-side transitive closure table. Routed in TermX as a type-level operation on ConceptMap (POST /ConceptMap/$closure) per kefhir's dispatch model.

parameter.name: name
parameter.documentation: The name that defines the particular context for the subsumption based closure table.

parameter.name: concept
parameter.documentation: A list of concepts to add to the closure table.

parameter.name: version
parameter.documentation: Replay: return the closure as of the given version (string form of the integer version).

parameter.name: return
parameter.documentation: A concept map with the transitive closure delta for this call.
